model_details: OR was adjusted for age (5-y age group), gender, public health center (PHC) area, and duration of the fasting period prior to blood sampling (less than 7 hours, 7 hours or more, or unknown).

OR was adjusted for age (5-y age group), gender, PHC area, duration of the fasting period prior to blood sampling (less than 7 hours, 7 hours or more, or unknown), smoking, body mass index, and past history of diabetes mellitus.
